title: Visualizing Cartesian Products and Relations
description: A diagram showing how Cartesian products form sets of ordered pairs from two sets, and how relations are subsets of these Cartesian products defined by a specific rule.
elements: Relation R: 'a is less than b'
relationships: Set A and Set B are the input sets
The Cartesian Product A × B contains all possible ordered pairs (a,b)
A Relation R is a rule that selects specific ordered pairs from A × B
The selected pairs form a subset of the Cartesian product
